name: Korbit AI
tagline: AI-powered code reviews and developer mentoring
description: Khosla-backed Korbit raised $11M for AI code review. GitHub Copilot's expansion into code review crushed every specialized competitor — the top 3 agents controlled 72% of all activity.
story: Korbit AI was founded in Montreal in 2017 and raised $11 million in a Series A led by Khosla Ventures to build AI-powered code review and developer mentoring tools. The product was technically solid, offering automated code analysis with educational feedback. But the AI code review market consolidated rapidly around a few dominant players. When GitHub Copilot expanded into code review, it crushed the specialized startups — analysis showed the top 3 AI review agents controlled 72% of all pull request activity. Korbit couldn't compete with a tool that was free or pre-installed in every GitHub organization. The company announced its closure in 2026, another casualty of platform bundling in the developer tools space.

sources.title: Korbit AI Shutdown: Migrate to CodeAnt AI
